duplicates.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Plumbing Repair Searches Lifting Discretionary Sector

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily spike in google trends for emergency plumbing repair signals consumer stress rebound benefiting discretionary sector

idea.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Plumbing Repair Searches Lifting Discretionary Sector
idea.thesis: Increased urgent plumbing repair searches indicate household stress and short-term demand for services. Discretionary sector benefits from increased home repair spending during stress periods.
data_sources: Google Trends daily search interest for emergency plumbing repair
idea.signal_logic: If daily search volume exceeds 25% above 7-day moving average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If daily search volume exceeds 25% above 7-day moving average Exit: When volume normalizes below 10% above average
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily search interest for emergency plumbing repair via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Frequent plumbing emergencies drive daily search spikes.
